# CVAttachmentMode.shouldPropagate

**Case**

Indicates to copy the attachment.

## Declaration

```swift
case shouldPropagate
```

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVBufferPropagateAttachments(_:_:)] function propagates all attachments that have this attachment mode. For example, in most cases, you’ll want to propagate an attachment bearing a timestamp to each successive buffer.

## Constants

- **CVAttachmentMode.shouldNotPropagate**: Indicates to not propagate the attachment.
